WITH yearly_max_points AS (
  SELECT 
    r.year,
    MAX(driver_points) AS max_driver_points,
    MAX(constructor_points) AS max_constructor_points
  FROM races r
  JOIN results res ON r.race_id = res.race_id
  JOIN (
    SELECT race_id, driver_id, SUM(points) AS driver_points
    FROM results
    WHERE points IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY race_id, driver_id
  ) driver_totals ON res.race_id = driver_totals.race_id AND res.driver_id = driver_totals.driver_id
  JOIN (
    SELECT race_id, constructor_i...

WITH driver_yearly_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        res.driver_id,
        SUM(res.points) AS total_driver_points
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.race_id = r.race_id
    GROUP BY r.year, res.driver_id
),
constructor_yearly_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        res.constructor_id,
        SUM(res.points) AS total_constructor_points
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.race_id = r.race_id
    GROUP BY r.year, res.constructor_id
),
